data.title: Explore GUI automation MCP for Spectrolite (visual cursor control)

data.body: Test installing automation-mcp or macos-ui-automation-mcp to control Spectrolite's GUI visually. Would let Claude move the cursor, click buttons, drag sliders while user watches. Tradeoff: slower and fragile vs headless, but fun and good for interactive fine-tuning. See research in notes/software-portfolio-execution-plan.md and tools/spectrolite-mcp/ for context. GitHub repos: github.com/ashwwwin/automation-mcp, github.com/mb-dev/macos-ui-automation-mcp
